author: bfonta
body:
Supports any number of CSV files as input. Useful for memory measurements.

Tested with:

```
python3 HLTrigger/Configuration/scripts/compareMemoryProfiles.py logs.gpu-nvidia.16j.16t.16s.allGPUs/gpu_memory_gpu-nvidia_16j_16t_16s.csv logs.gpu-nvidia_ngtScouting.16j.16t.16s.allGPUs/gpu_memory_gpu-nvidia_ngtScouting_16j_16t_16s.csv ../../ICHEP_ThreePRs/src/logs.gpu-nvidia_ngtScouting.16j.16t.16s.allGPUs/gpu_memory_gpu-nvidia_ngtScouting_16j_16t_16s.csv --csv-labels "Baseline" "NGT Scouting Baseline" "New NGT Scouting" --cms-label Preliminary --outfile memory
```

Heavily inspired by private work from @Parsifal-2045.
title: Support any number of CSV files for memory measurements.
